name: Green Pro Golf Simulators
about: Green Pro Golf Simulators provides customized golf simulator solutions for any size space or budget. They serve a wide range of venues including residential homes, businesses, golf courses, restaurants, bars, basements, garages, schools, and 24/7 commercial facilities. The company partners with all major golf simulator product vendors to offer direct access to industry representatives and technical support. Green Pro prides itself on providing personalized service, unmatched quality by not marking up product pricing, and competitive pricing, often offering free shipping on most products. Their solutions are built with premium components and expert installation, ensuring high performance and durability.
why_golfers_like_it: Customized simulator solutions tailored to any space or budget
Premium components and expert installation for unmatched performance
Partnerships with all major vendors ensure competitive pricing and support
Simulators double as private movie theaters and entertainment spaces
High-quality launch monitors for detailed swing feedback and improvement tracking

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service.
No mention of on-site alcohol service.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether you need to bring your own clubs. It is recommended to contact them directly for clarification.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answers: There is no mention of a bring-your-own policy for food or drinks. Contact the venue for more information on their policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes, which can vary depending on the simulator software and number of players.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Green Pro Golf Simulators serves families and mentions schools as one of the venues they cater to, suggesting a welcoming environment for juniors and youth.
